title: CSS
desc:
What You'll Learn in Depth:

  • ✅ Core Fundamentals: Understanding Selectors, Specificity, and the Cascade (C-S-S) logic.
  • ✅ Advanced Box Model: Mastering Padding, Margin, Border, and box-sizing properties.
  • ✅ Modern Layout Engines: Full deep-dive into Flexbox and CSS Grid for building intricate, professional layouts.
  • ✅ Responsive Web Design (RWD): Implementing Fluid Grids, Flexible Images, and Media Queries with a Mobile-First Strategy.
  • ✅ Dynamic Visuals: Using CSS Variables (Custom Properties) for theme switching and better maintainability.
  • ✅ Animation & Interactivity: Creating high-performance 2D/3D Transforms, Transitions, and Keyframe Animations.
  • ✅ CSS Frameworks & Preprocessors: An introduction to Tailwind CSS/Bootstrap best practices and SASS/SCSS workflow.

🌟 Why This Module Matters:

CSS shudhu matro color ba font change korar tool noy; eta holo ekti powerful design system. Ei module sheshe tumi ekti simple HTML skeleton-ke professional, responsive, ebong user-friendly interface-e rupantor korte parbe. Amra focus korbo 'Clean Code' ebong 'Cross-Browser Compatibility' upore, jate tomar design sob browser-e ekei rokom dekha jay.

💡 Daily Tip: CSS tricks shikhar jonno 'Inspect Element' e somoy dao ebong boro boro website-er styling analyze koro. Practice coding at least 1 hour every day.

"Success in web development is built layer by layer—much like CSS. Stay consistent, stay disciplined, and your progress will become visible to the world."
